name: add_cells_to_pblock
full_help:
add_cells_to_pblock

Description: 
Add cells to a Pblock

Syntax: 
add_cells_to_pblock  [-top] [-add_primitives] [-clear_locs] [-quiet] [-verbose]
                     <pblock> [<cells>...]

Usage: 
  Name               Description
  ------------------------------
  [-top]             Add the top level instance; This option can't be used 
                     with -cells, or -add_primitives options. You must 
                     specify either -cells or -top option.
  [-add_primitives]  Assign to the pblock only primitive cells from the 
                     specified list of cells.
  [-clear_locs]      Clear instance location constraints
  [-quiet]           Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]         Suspend message limits during command execution
  <pblock>           Pblock to add cells to
  [<cells>]          Cells to add. You can't use this option with -top 
                     option. You must specify either -cells or -top option.

Categories: 
Floorplan, XDC
